svg.title: HTML tag closer workflow
svg.desc: Diagram showing the four feature layers of the tag-closing function and the architectural pivot from DOMParser-based composition to recursive descent.
svg.text: — Reintegrate title-wrapping (with "missing" fallback) into the recursive walk
— Test against the malformed inputs that motivated the rewrite
— Reconsider DOMParser entirely; a token/string-level parser may fit better
— Add test cases for each feature layer (hierarchy, titles, self-closing, lists)
— Decide handling for edge cases: nested lists, attributes on hierarchy tags
